name: typescript-decorators-koans
description: Personal TypeScript decorators koans for modern and legacy decorator models.

scripts.clean:legacy: node -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('.koan-build', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.test: npm run test:modern && npm run test:legacy
scripts.test:legacy: npm run clean:legacy && tsc -p tsconfig.legacy.test.json && node --test .koan-build/legacy/koans/9*/exercise.test.js
scripts.test:koan:legacy: npm run clean:legacy && tsc -p tsconfig.legacy.test.json && node --test
